title: command podman compose runs docker-compose, why?
body:
### Issue Description

podman-compose worked fine till i install docker and docker-compose on my system ArchLinux

### Steps to reproduce the issue

podman compose up

### Describe the results you received

Describe the results you received❯ podman-compose --version
podman-compose version 1.5.0
podman version 5.7.1


$ podman compose up

>>>> Executing external compose provider "/usr/lib/docker/cli-plugins/docker-compose". Please see podman-compose(1) for how to disable this message. <<<<

unable to get image 'caddymanager/caddymanager-backend:latest': Cannot connect to the Docker daemon at unix:///run/podman/podman.sock. Is the docker daemon running?
Error: executing /usr/lib/docker/cli-plugins/docker-compose -f ./compos-origin.yml up: exit status 1


### Describe the results you expected

nothing about docker, podman only!

### podman info output

```yaml
podman version 5.7.1
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
Because docker-compose (against the podman socket) works significantly better than podman-compose for most users as such we default to docker-compose if both are present as documented

https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-compose.1.html
